change_summary: Recorded a reproducible hold-quality taxonomy for accepted-stack bad trades without changing strategy behavior or adding filters.
hypothesis: Accepted-stack bad trades may cluster by post-entry hold quality into repeated families with measurable future-fix candidates and good-trade collateral risk.
notes: Artifact: data/exp_20260427_004_hold_quality_taxonomy.json. Across three windows: 32 bad trades, -10637.30 PnL. Largest repeated family: early_flush_no_reclaim, 8 bad trades, -3294.16 PnL, present in all windows, zero observed winner collateral. High-collateral families include good_run_then_giveback_risk, 3 bad trades but 29 winner collateral trades, +69710.58 PnL; do not convert directly. Decision observed_only.
